channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Maps show this July 4th could be hottest ever in parts of U.S.
item.description: Extreme heat and humidity could push heat index readings to 100-115 degrees from the Midwest to the East Coast, forecasters warn.

item.title: Trump combined disaster aid announcements with plugs for GOP candidates
item.description: Trump approved over $846M in disaster relief for Republican-leaning states, linking the announcements to endorsements for upcoming candidates.

item.title: Peace talks paused as Iran gears up for dayslong funeral for slain supreme leader
item.description: The flag-draped casket of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was displayed in Tehran on Friday, with millions expected to attend the multi-day funeral.

item.title: Coast Guard surges resources to DC and elsewhere to protect July 4 celebrations
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard is surging resources to protect July 4 celebrations in Washington and other locations.
